frame.name: Cast Drop
frame.subtitle: Cast Drop
frame.description: **CastDrop ⚡** — A one-tap cast generator for Farcaster. Pick a vibe from 12 categories (GM, Crypto, DeFi, AI, Trading & more), get a random cast with a matching image, and share it directly to Warpcast. No login, no API keys, no setup. Just drop and cast.
